task_1.description: Validate baseline portfolio exposures, concentration, and risk drivers from provided data

observations: Portfolio beta is 0.23; Sharpe 3.71; Sortino 5.32
Baseline avg correlation 0.1904 rises to 0.3181 under stress
Left-tail scenarios: credit stress -12.51%, fed overtightening -7.11%, tariff crash -6.93%
Top long downside drivers across stress: ODD, CELH, CASY, COCO, IPAR
Short book risk drivers (rally in stress): COTY, SPB, TGT; also ENR, MGPI
Upside/downside capture flags: ODD down_capture 106, COCO 113, IPAR 85 (elevated); defensives CL down 26, PM down -3.5

task_2.description: Run portfolio-level diagnostics to confirm baseline metrics and establish benchmarks

observations: Ran analyze_portfolio_performance, stress_test, and get_upside_downside_ratios successfully on the initial portfolio
Confirmed concentration metrics (top 3 ~22%, top 5 ~34%, top 10 ~56%), capture ratios (up 46.3, down 4.84), and scenario attributions

task_3.description: Drill down on ticker-level risk/alpha (beta, factor loads, downside capture, fundamentals) for key drivers

observations: ODD: beta ~1.25–1.32, downside capture ~112, high valuation; quality strong but momentum mixed; tail contributor in multiple stress tests
CELH: explosive growth, high volatility; individual metrics show elevated downside capture and overbought RSI; large drawdowns in credit/fed stress; position needs right-sizing
IPAR: beta ~0.85 but high downside capture (~95), expensive and negative momentum; large losses in credit/fed stress; trim candidate
COCO: quality long with beta ~0.73, decent upside/downside asymmetry; keep but trim modestly due to stress sensitivity
CASY: strong defensive compounder, beta ~0.64, good upside with low downside; core long
Shorts with tail-risk issues: COTY, SPB, ENR, TGT rally in major downside stress; they worsen left-tail P&L while being shorts
completion_evidence.summary: Drilled down on key tickers; flagged ODD/CELH/IPAR/COCO trims; upgrade defensives (PM, CL, WMT, CASY); rotate shorts away from COTY/SPB/ENR into CPB/REYN/WDFC/UVV

task_4.description: Construct Iteration 1 portfolio: reduce factor/beta concentration, rebalance gross, maintain ~30% net long

observations: Constructed Iteration 1 portfolio (18 longs, 13 shorts), net long 30%, gross 126%
Rebalanced down high-beta longs (ODD, CELH, IPAR, COCO) and added KO; rotated shorts away from COTY/SPB/ENR into CPB/REYN/WDFC/UVV/PRMB/EL/EPC/FRPT

task_5.description: Test Iteration 1 across historical/hypothetical stress scenarios and up/down capture; compare vs baseline

observations: Stress tests vs baseline improved: credit_stress -12.51% to -8.18%; fed_overtightening -7.11% to -4.83%; tariff_crash -6.93% to -4.65%
Beta reduced from 0.23 to 0.15; portfolio_up_capture from 46.3 to 31.6; down_capture ~5.16 (close to 4.84)

task_6.description: Refine to Iteration 2: add/replace with lower-beta, higher-quality names; optimize shorts to improve tail risk

observations: Iteration 2 constructed and optimized: 18 longs, 11 shorts; gross 1.00, net +0.30
Rebalanced trims on ODD/CELH/IPAR/COCO/VITL/SFM; increased defensives (CL/PM/WMT/CASY/BJ/KO/INGR)
Short book diversified to reduce tail-risk (kept WBA, added WMK; maintained KVUE/KLG/JJSF/SEB/CPB/REYN/WDFC/UVV/PRMB)
Baseline avg correlation 0.1796; stress avg correlation ~0.183 (stable vs Iteration 1); portfolio beta ~0.19

task_7.description: Test Iteration 2, optionally Iteration 3 if needed; lock final portfolio that meets targets

observations: Iteration 2 stress improvements vs Iteration 1: credit_stress improved from -8.18% to -5.10%; fed_overtightening from -4.83% to -3.35%; tariff_crash from -4.65% to -2.97%
Portfolio metrics: beta ~0.19, max drawdown -4.23%, Sharpe ~2.47; portfolio up/down capture ~29.10/12.03
Counts/constraints satisfied: 18 longs, 11 shorts, net +30%

task_8.description: Deliver final portfolio JSON with weights and reasons for adjustments, plus risk-management recommendations

observations: Delivered final portfolio: 18 longs, 11 shorts; gross 1.00, net +0.30
Portfolio beta ~0.19; max drawdown ~-4.2% in backtest; Sharpe ~2.5
Stress improvements vs baseline (total P&L): tariff_crash -6.93% to -2.97%; hot_cpi -3.79% to -1.62%; fed_overtightening -7.11% to -3.35%; credit_stress -12.51% to -5.10%
Average portfolio correlation stable (baseline ~0.18; stress ~0.183) indicating diversified construction

High-beta longs (ODD, CELH, IPAR, COCO, VITL) trimmed; defensive longs (PM, CL, WMT, CASY, KO, BJ, INGR) increased; shorts rotated to lower tail-risk set (WMK, CPB, REYN, WDFC, UVV, PRMB, keep WBA/KVUE/KLG/JJSF/SEB)
